hero.title: Turn One Video Into
hero.subtitle: Paste a link or upload a file — AI automatically transcribes and repurposes your content into blog posts, social threads, newsletters, and more.
hero.placeholder: Paste YouTube, podcast, or any video link...

steps.title: Paste or Upload
steps.desc: Drop a YouTube link, upload an audio file, or paste text. No configuration needed — just one click.

steps.title: AI Works Its Magic
steps.desc: Our AI transcribes and understands your content, then intelligently rewrites it for each platform's unique style.

steps.title: Publish Everywhere
steps.desc: Get polished content for WeChat, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, blogs, and more. Copy, download, or share instantly.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything You Need to
features.subtitle: Built for creators who want to maximize every piece of content they produce.

list.title: AI-Powered Rewriting
list.desc: Not just transcription — our AI understands context and rewrites for each platform's unique voice and format.

list.title: 10 Output Formats
list.desc: Blog posts, Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, Xiaohongshu notes, newsletters, SRT subtitles, SEO articles, and more.

list.title: 63+ Languages
list.desc: Transcribe and generate content in 63+ languages. Perfect for international creators and global audiences.

list.title: Streaming Generation
list.desc: See content appear character by character in real-time. No more waiting for loading spinners.

list.title: Conversational Refinement
list.desc: Chat with each output to fine-tune it. Say "make it shorter" or "add emoji" — AI applies it instantly.

list.title: 6 Export Formats
list.desc: Download as Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, or CSV. Directly ready for publishing.

list.title: Share & Collaborate
list.desc: Generate shareable links for your teammates to view and collaborate on content.

list.title: Private & Secure
list.desc: Your content stays yours. Files are automatically deleted after processing. No data retention.

list.title: Smart Platform Detection
list.desc: Paste a YouTube link? We suggest blog + Twitter. Paste Bilibili? We suggest WeChat + Xiaohongshu.

formats.outputSubtitle: Generate everything simultaneously — no need to run the tool multiple times.
formats.langSubtitle: Transcribe and generate content in 63+ languages. Perfect for international creators and global audiences.

testimonials.text: "Finally a tool that understands content creation workflow. One video → all platforms in minutes. Game changer for my content schedule."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "The conversational refinement is brilliant. I can tweak each output by just chatting with it. Saves me hours every week."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "I was skeptical about AI content, but the quality genuinely surprised me. The platform-specific formatting is spot on."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "As a solo founder, this tool gives me a content team's output. LinkedIn posts, blogs, tweets — all from one video."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.

cta.title: Ready to
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of creators who turn every video into a complete multi-platform content strategy. Start free — no credit card needed.

footer.tagline: AI-powered content repurposing. Turn one video into your entire multi-platform content strategy.
